boundary: These cases exercise ArchSig bounded diagnostic consistency over supplied ArchMap, LawPolicy, and evidence contract. They do not require ArchSig to implement the full generality of AAT Part IV.

cases.assertion: A measured or zero signature axis must not remain in distanceDiagnosis.unmeasuredAxes through an axis:* / sig-axis:* namespace mismatch.
cases.expectedFailure: summary reports a measured axis as unmeasured

cases.fixtureKind: non-unit-law-policy; executable negative cases in part4_distance_policy_negative_cases.json
cases.assertion: Changing part4DistanceProfile atomWeights or signatureWeights must change the corresponding atom or signature distance readings.
cases.expectedFailure: non-unit profile weights are copied into packet metadata but do not affect evaluator values

cases.assertion: A missing selected operation cost must block operationGeometry and summary repair distance instead of being omitted from the family aggregate.
cases.expectedFailure: operationGeometry becomes measured from remaining measured costs

cases.assertion: distanceDiagnosis repair and curvature compact refs must read actual raw packet field names and be non-null.
cases.expectedFailure: summary emits null operation or curvature ids

cases.assertion: Every distanceDiagnosis.detailRefs packet pointer must resolve into the raw analysis packet.
cases.expectedFailure: summary and viewer share a stale packet ref that no test resolves
